events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`.

**Summary:** Sloping that doesn't match the tabulated data for the actual soil type is a direct violation of 29 CFR 1926.652(b) / Subpart P Appendix B and creates an imminent cave-in hazard — a critical, fail-grade condition since the trench is actively in progress. Required immediate actions: stop work, clear the trench, have a competent person verify soil classification (Appendix A), then re-slope to the correct angle or substitute an engineered shoring/shield system before work resumes.
